specializations.name: Heavy Assault
specializations.desc: Strength and physical capability. Strength, power, load capacity.

specializations.name: Recon
specializations.desc: Endurance and adaptability. Running, mobility, conditioning.

specializations.name: Guardian
specializations.desc: Resilience and support. Recovery, health, helping others.

specializations.name: Engineer
specializations.desc: Skills and problem solving. Building, repair, technical skills.

specializations.name: Command
specializations.desc: Leadership. Squad leadership, mentoring, community contribution.

rankUpLines.Operator: Recruit no more. Command has reviewed your file — consistency, not perfection, and it shows. Welcome to full operational status, Operator.
rankUpLines.Senior Operator: Multiple Campaigns behind you now. Command doesn't hand out 'Senior' lightly. You've earned the weight of that word.
rankUpLines.Specialist: Command has flagged your file for advanced standing. Whatever track you choose next, you've already proven you finish what you start.
rankUpLines.Vanguard: There's a reason this rank has a name and not just a number. You are what the Initiative was built to create. Command salutes you.

commandQuips: High Command wants a report on 'operator morale.' I told them morale is high. I have no idea if that's true. Please make it true.
Reminder from Command: the Kharvax do not observe weekends. Neither, technically, do push-ups.
High Command approved a new commendation for 'Exceptional Hydration.' Please drink water. Please also stop asking why.
Command has been asked to remind everyone that 'creative interpretation' of a Protocol still counts, as long as the work actually happened.
Somewhere in the Hollow Reach, a Kharvax colony has no idea today is leg day. Let's keep it that way.
High Command sent a 40-page memo about 'synergy.' Command read page one. Command believes in you regardless.
Today's briefing is short: show up, log it, move on. The Swarm respects consistency more than heroics.

statusDecay.note: Status is computed from the WORSE of two checks: days since your last log, and your rolling 14-day logging rate. See app source for exact tiers.
